content:
Artist: Bruno Mars
Song: Just the Way You Are

Capo 5


[Intro]  

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 Oh, her eyes, her eyes make the stars look like they're not shining[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
 Her hair, her hair falls perfectly without her trying[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                       [ch]C[/ch]
 She's so beautiful, and I tell her every day[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
Yeah, I know, I know when I compliment her she won't believe me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
 And it's so, it's so sad to think she don't see what I see[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                           [ch]C[/ch]
 But every time she asks me do I look okay I say[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
When I see your face, there's not a thing that I would change[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
Cause you're amazing, just the way you are[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
And when you smile, the whole world stops and stares for a while[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Cause girl you're amazing, just the way you are[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 Her lips, her lips I could kiss them all day if she'd let me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
 Her laugh, her laugh she hates but I think it's so sexy[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                        [ch]C[/ch]
 She's so beautiful, and I tell her every day[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, you know, you know, you know I'd never ask you to change[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]
If perfect is what you're searching for, then just stay the same[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                                        [ch]C[/ch]
So, don't even bother asking if you look okay, you know I say[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
When I see your face, there's not a thing that I would change[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
Cause you're amazing, just the way you are[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
And when you smile, the whole world stops and stares for a while[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Cause girl you're amazing, just the way you are[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
The way you are, the way you are[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Girl you're amazing, just the way you are[/tab]
